welcome: Welcome to PDF Studio! 🎉📄 Here, you'll find all the tools you need to work with PDF files quickly and efficiently. With PDF Studio, you can: ✨ Edit, split, or merge PDFs. 🔍 Convert files to and from PDF. 🔒 Secure your documents with passwords. ✏️ Fill out interactive forms, and much more! We're here to make your PDF experience seamless. If you need assistance, just ask! 🚀 Ready to get started? 😃
too_many_requests: Too many requests. Please try again in a few seconds.
access_denied: Unable to identify you. Access denied.
blocked_user: You are blocked from using this bot.
pro_limit_reached: ⚠️ You have reached your daily limit of 50 operations. As a PRO user, this is our safety limit. Please try again tomorrow.
free_limit_reached: ⚠️ You have reached your daily limit of 3 operations. Upgrade to PRO for unlimited access (up to 50 ops/day)! /pro
join_send_files:
📎 Send the PDF files you want to join.

Send up to {max} files one by one.
When done, type "done" to merge them.
join_limit_reached: ⚠️ You have reached the limit of {max} PDF files. Please type "done" to merge them or start over.
join_file_received:
📎 File "{name}" received.

You have sent {current}/{max} file(s) so far.
Send more files or type "done" to merge them.
join_more_files_required: ⚠️ Please send more PDF files or type "done" to merge them.
join_at_least_two: ⚠️ You need to send at least two PDF files to join them. Please send more files.
join_success: ✅ Here is your joined PDF file!
join_error: ❌ An error occurred while joining your PDF files. Please try again later.
download_send_url:
🌐 Send me a URL and I'll convert it to PDF!

📝 Supported: websites, articles, documentation
⚠️ Note: Some sites may block automated access
download_error: ❌ An error occurred while converting the URL to PDF.
pdftoimages_send_file: 🖼️ Send me a PDF file and I'll convert its pages to images!
pdftoimages_success: ✅ Here are the images from your PDF!
pdftoimages_error: ❌ An error occurred while converting your PDF to images. Please try again later.
putpassword_send_file: 🔐 Send me the PDF file you want to protect with a password.
putpassword_send_password: 🔑 Now, send me the password you want to set for this PDF.
putpassword_success: ✅ Here is your password-protected PDF file!
putpassword_error: ❌ An error occurred while protecting your PDF file. Please try again later.
removepassword_send_file: 🔓 Send me the PDF file you want to remove the password from.
removepassword_send_password: 🔑 Now, send me the password of this PDF.
removepassword_processing: 🔄 Removing password from your PDF file...
removepassword_success: ✅ Password removed successfully! Here is your PDF file.
removepassword_error: ❌ An error occurred while removing the password from your PDF file. Please check the password and try again.
split_send_file: ✂️ Send me the PDF file you want to split.
split_success: ✅ Here are the pages from your PDF file!
split_error: ❌ An error occurred while splitting your PDF file. Please try again later.
summary_send_file: 📝 Send me a PDF file and I'll summarize it for you!
summary_error: ❌ An error occurred while summarizing your PDF file. Please try again later.
feedback_send_message: 💬 Please send your feedback. It will be sent directly to the developer.
pro_already_pro: 🌟 You are already a Pro user!
pro_upgrade: 💎 Upgrade to Pro for more daily usage and features!
pro_success: 🎉 Thank you for subscribing to PRO! You now have full access to all features.
